2026-06-10 FM E-Skip Log

E-Skip from the Eastern and Southeastern US, some western US stations, and some Canadian stations. Received in South Central MN

Technics SA-G67 with Indoor Dipole Antenna, 2nd floor:

WCKN-FM 92.5MHz "Kickin' 92.5"

Location: Moncks Corner, SC

Distance: 1070 mi (1722 km)

Stock radio and antenna in 1994 Caprice:

WLAN-FM 96.9MHz "FM 97"

Location: Lancaster, PA

Distance: 915 mi (1473 km)

WBOE-FM 97.7MHz "92.1 and 97.7 The Bone"

Location: Panama City, FL

Distance: 1034 mi (1664 km)

RTL-SDR v3 with Log Periodic TV antenna mounted about 40 ft above ground:

WJIZ-FM 96.3MHz "96.3 WJIZ"

Location: Albany, GA

Distance: 1007 mi (1620 km)

CJWE-FM 88.1MHz [possibly HD?]

Location: Calgary, Alberta, Canada

Distance: 1076 mi (1732 km)

WRJA-FM 88.1MHz "South Carolina Public Radio" [HD]

Location: Sumter, SC

Distance: 998 mi (1606 km)

WUWF-FM 88.1MHz

Location: Pensacola, FL

Distance: 1009 mi (1624 km)

WGTS-FM 91.9MHz "WGTS 91.9"

Location: Takoma Park, MD

Distance: 917 mi (1476 km)

WGBZ-FM "WGTS 91.9"

Location: Ocean City, MD

Distance: 1021 mi (1644 km)

WBLX-FM 92.9MHz "93 BLX"

Location, Mobile, AL

Distance: 983 mi (1582 km)

WNCV-FM 93.3MHz "Coast 93.3"

Location: Shalimar, FL

Distance: 1015 mi (1634 km)

WKSJ-FM 94.9MHz "95KSJ"

Location: Mobile, AL (same tower as WBLX)

Distance: 983 mi (1582 km)

Sony Walkman WM-FX43 with headphone antenna, backyard:

CKBE-FM 92.5MHz "The Beat 92.5"

Location: Montreal, Quebec, Canada

Distance: 978 mi (1574 km)

WMJY-FM 93.7 "Magic 93.7"

Location: Biloxi, MS

Distance: 974 mi (1568 km)

KENZ-FM 94.9MHz "Power 94.9"

Location: Provo, UT

Distance: 977 mi (1573 km)

WTIX-FM 94.3MHz

Location: Galliano, LA

Distance: 1022 mi (1645 km)
